title: A bug in AWS has caused some customers' bills to spike from a few cents to billions of dollars - Engadget
summary: An AWS spokesperson wrote that "the displayed billing estimates do not reflect actual usage and charges." The AWS Service Health Dashboard states that the problem stemmed from incorrect unit pricing in its estimated billing computation system.
caption: output/2026-07-17/a-bug-in-aws-has-caused-some-customers-bills-to-spike-from-a-few-cents.txt
